customHandlers.mockListHandler: function(ctx) { return [ { vod_id: 'mock_column_1', vod_name: '新闻联播（模拟）', vod_pic: 'https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=1' }, { vod_id: 'mock_column_2', vod_name: '焦点访谈（模拟）', vod_pic: 'https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=2' }, { vod_id: 'mock_column_3', vod_name: '今日说法（模拟）', vod_pic: 'https://picsum.photos/200/300?random=3' } ]; }
customHandlers.mockDetailHandler: function(ctx) { let episodes = []; if (ctx.vodId === 'mock_column_1') { episodes = [ { title: '2025-01-01 新闻联播', url: 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8' }, { title: '2025-01-02 新闻联播', url: 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8' }, { title: '2025-01-03 新闻联播', url: 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8' } ]; } else if (ctx.vodId === 'mock_column_2') { episodes = [ { title: '2025-01-01 焦点访谈', url: 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8' }, { title: '2025-01-02 焦点访谈', url: 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8' } ]; } else { episodes = [ { title: '2025-01-01 今日说法', url: 'https://test-streams.mux.dev/x36xhzz/x36xhzz.m3u8' } ]; } let playUrl = episodes.map(ep => `${ep.title}$${ep.url}`).join('#'); return { list: [ { vod_id: ctx.vodId, vod_name: ctx.vodId === 'mock_column_1' ? '新闻联播' : (ctx.vodId === 'mock_column_2' ? '焦点访谈' : '今日说法'), vod_pic: 'https://picsum.photos/200/300', vod_play_url: playUrl } ] }; }
customHandlers.mockPlayHandler: function(ctx) { return { parse: 0, playUrl: '', url: ctx.id }; }
